_comment: IDEA-013 PROBE settings (TASK-805) — throwaway. Apply via `claude --settings "$(cat docs/probes/scratch/settings.json)"` OR copy to .claude/settings.local.json transiently. Do NOT commit into the live .claude/settings.json. No `matcher` key => matches ALL tools (per Claude Code hooks docs). PreToolUse timeout 600s lets the multi-minute block test run; Stop hook (timeout 30s) logs turn-end for Probe C.
